p1_observation: SmolLM2 generated a fluent and nice appropriate next-word prediction while remaining fast.
p2_observation: Qwen produced the most  accurate prediction due to its larger model size.
p3_observation: DistilGPT2 generated a valid prediction quickly, but its output was simpler.
hallucination_detail: No significant hallucinations were observed during the next-word prediction tasks.
biggest_surprise: Even though SmolLM2 is smaller than Qwen, it produced surprisingly good predictions while running much faster.
